items.title: Per source, here are the official pick details for what the Hawks sent out in the Dort/Risacher trade:
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Per source, here are the official pick details for what the Hawks sent out in the Dort/Risacher trade:

- Top-55 protected 2027 to Dallas

- 2031 most favorable of ATL/HOU to OKC

- 2032 most favorable of ATL/LAL to OKC

(So 2 real second round picks and 1 very fake one.)

items.title: Tyler Nickel shot 41.3% on 9.2 three-point attempts per game at Summer League.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Tyler Nickel shot 41.3% on 9.2 three-point attempts per game at Summer League. 

He is just the second player this decade to average more than nine 3PTA per game and shoot over 40% from downtown in Vegas (the other cat in this club is Cavs' Sam Merrill) 

Leon found one.
